name: lz-tdd
description: Test-driven development guidance for Claude Code across the red-green-refactor loop. Includes the lz-red skill for the red step (choosing and writing the next failing unit test), the lz-tpp skill for the green step (Robert C. Martin's Transformation Priority Premise), and the lz-refactor skill for the refactor step (Fowler and Kerievsky refactorings, code smells, and design patterns).
